prompt: A sprawling, impossibly vast ancient library. On the left side, intricate, towering wooden bookshelves packed tightly with ancient, breathing, moss-covered leather books. Ascending suddenly to the right, the bookshelves have been violently sheared off and replaced by cold, sterile, blank white concrete walls that stretch into nothingness. Volumetric lighting, dust motes in the air, hyper-realistic macro photography --no text, no charts, no people.
dataset_name: Global Forest Watch - Primary Forest Loss
insight: Complex, irreplaceable histories that took millennia to build are being rapidly wiped blank, leaving behind sterile emptiness.
